achievements.description: Kill 75 enemies by using the 'Hydro Storm' on them

achievements.title: Gotcha!
achievements.description: You managed to kill a Dragon Zombie without starting the fight
achievements.author: MarioDuarteGJ

achievements.title: Keruberosu
achievements.description: [Magician Mode] Defeat Cerberus without taking a hit and always having a Hawk helping you (no heart usage)
achievements.author: MarioDuarteGJ

achievements.title: Retired Shaft
achievements.description: [Magician Mode] Defeat Necromancer without taking a hit and always having Poison Clouds around you (Jupiter + Manticore, no Cross allowed)
achievements.author: MarioDuarteGJ

achievements.title: Falling to Pieces
achievements.description: [Magician Mode] Defeat Iron Golem without taking a hit and using only the Darkness Whip (Mercury + Black Dog)
achievements.author: MarioDuarteGJ

achievements.title: Soul Stealer
achievements.description: [Magician Mode] Defeat Adramelech without taking a hit and using only the Holy Sword (Mars + Unicorn)
achievements.author: MarioDuarteGJ

achievements.title: Double Smack!!
achievements.description: [Magician Mode] Defeat the Twin Dragons without taking more than 3 hits (no Uranus, Pluto or Neptune allowed)
achievements.author: MarioDuarteGJ

achievements.title: Dracula's Trusty Ally
achievements.description: [Magician Mode] Defeat Death without taking a hit and using only Tonfers (Mars + Cockatrice, Camilla alive)
achievements.author: MarioDuarteGJ

achievements.title: The Best Offense is Defense
achievements.description: [Magician Mode] Defeat Camilla without taking a hit and using only the Circular Shield (Jupiter + Unicorn)
achievements.author: MarioDuarteGJ

achievements.title: Hugh vs Jackman
achievements.description: [Magician Mode] Defeat Hugh without taking a hit and using only Poison Claws (Mars + Manticore)
achievements.author: MarioDuarteGJ

achievements.title: Die, Monster!
achievements.description: [Magician Mode] Defeat Dracula's 1st form without taking a hit and using only the Holy Whip (Mercury + Unicorn)
achievements.author: MarioDuarteGJ

achievements.title: You Don't Belong in this World!
achievements.description: [Magician Mode] Defeat Dracula's 2nd form without taking a hit or using the Cross (no Uranus, Neptune or Pluto allowed)
achievements.author: MarioDuarteGJ

achievements.title: Miserable Pile of Secrets
achievements.description: You've found every breakable wall in the castle
achievements.author: MarioDuarteGJ

achievements.description: You've found every Hearts Max upgrade in the castle

achievements.title: Healthy Man
achievements.description: You've found every HP Max upgrade in the castle
achievements.author: MarioDuarteGJ

achievements.title: Arek's Challenge
achievements.description: Enter the Underground Waterway from the Abyss Stairway and reach the boss door without the Cleansing, Roc Wing, dying, equipping the Unicorn card, or using Fighter or Magician Mode in one session
achievements.author: MarioDuarteGJ

achievements.title: Challenge of Gods
achievements.description: [Fighter Mode] Complete the entire Battle Arena without using sub weapons and without recovering your health (<=50 Level)
achievements.author: MarioDuarteGJ
